leadText: Magical Torque (Japanese: マジカルアクセル Magical Accel) is a damage-dealing Fairy-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of the Ruchbah Starmobile.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Magical Torque inflicts damage and has a 30% chance of confusing the target. Encore , Instruct , Mimic , and Sketch fail if the target's last used move was Magical Torque. Copycat fails if the last used move was Magical Torque.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V ---

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Prior to the release of The Hidden Treasure of Area Zero expansion for Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , Magical Torque was the only Fairy-type move to have been introduced in Generation IX . Magical Torque is the only physical Fairy-type move that does not make contact , outside of Z-Moves and Max Moves , though it is not accessible in regular gameplay.
